pages.name: Smallest Forge
pages.text: The smallest legal forge: a hollow shell of $(l)Furnace Bricks$() around one interior air block, with a $(l)Controller$(), a $(l)Fuel Port$() and a $(l)Drain$() in the walls.$(br2)Use the anchor button to project this ghost into your world and build along it.

The shell can be almost any shape:$(br2)- Corners are $(l)optional$()$(br)- The top can be $(l)open or closed$() — closed heats 20% faster$(br)- Partial structures still run at reduced effectiveness$(br2)Every interior air block adds one working slot and $(l)1,000 mB$() of molten storage. Right-click the controller to see everything at once.
pages.title: Scaling Up
